faq.q: Can Comet EV do highway trips?
faq.a: Occasional short highway legs only; choose Tiago or Punch for more range and DC charging.

chargingFaq.q: First-time EV buyer — is home charging enough?
chargingFaq.a: For typical city use below 230 km ARAI, overnight AC works for many buyers — confirm society/workplace access first.

dailyOfficeCommute.explanation: Well suited for office commutes when daily distance fits a 150–195 km real-world city band.

familyWeekendTrips.explanation: Practical for family weekend trips within its range band with planned stops.
familyWeekendTrips.tradeoffSummary: Packed highway weekends need charging discipline — not a petrol-style fill-and-go rhythm.

budgetOwnership.explanation: Better aligned with value-focused buyers at this ex-showroom band (EVSavari value score 86/100).

highwayConfidence.explanation: Highway planning band roughly 120–156 km — road-trip confidence rated low.
highwayConfidence.tradeoffSummary: Frequent high-speed touring without charging planning is less suitable.

firstTimeEVOwnership.tradeoffSummary: Buyers wanting zero lifestyle change on long routes should cross-shop longer-range options.

editorialNarratives.ownership: Ownership on mg EVs is generally practical for Indian buyers who value predictable service intervals and an 8-year battery warranty narrative. Resale confidence is modeled at 70/100 — interpret as editorial guidance, not a guarantee.
editorialNarratives.charging: Home or workplace AC charging at 3.3 kW is well suited for overnight top-ups; against a certified 230 km ARAI figure.
editorialNarratives.familySuitability: Family suitability scores 55/100 in our model — better aligned with couples or compact-family needs; boot space around 209 L should be checked against your stroller or luggage routine.
editorialNarratives.firstTimeEv: First-time EV friendliness is rated 80/100 with anxiety-reduction at 65/100. This variant is practical for buyers who want clear warranty terms and manageable charging habits — less ideal if you expect zero planning on long routes.
editorialNarratives.compare: In the city ev set on EVSavari, this variant is better aligned with buyers who prioritise tiny footprint for urban parking; trade-off: not highway-capable as primary car.
